basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of TMC ACTREC. A total of 03 vacancies have been announced through the TMC ACTREC Counselor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Psychology/Social Work or equivalent, Postgraduate degree in Psychology or Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work (desirable)
qualification.details: Counselor: Graduate in Psychology/Social Work or equivalent discipline from a recognized university. Fluent in Hindi, English, and at least one local regional language (Marathi, Konkani, or Gujarati). Knowledge of basic computer application is essential. Desirable: Postgraduate degree in Psychology or Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work. Prior experience in Tobacco Control preferred.

salary_details.details: Graduates: Rs. 30000/- p.m. Post Graduates: Rs. 35000/- p.m.

all_official_links.label: Download TMC ACTREC Counselor Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.advanced_centre_for_treatment_research_a: Graduate in Psychology/Social Work or equivalent, Postgraduate degree in Psychology or Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work (desirable)

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Counselor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC ACTREC Counselor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Counselor: Graduate in Psychology/Social Work or equivalent discipline from a recognized university. Fluent in Hindi, English, and at least one local regional language (Marathi, Konkani, or Gujarati). Knowledge of basic computer application is essential. Desirable: Postgraduate degree in Psychology or Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work. Prior experience in Tobacco Control preferred.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Graduates: Rs. 30000/- p.m. Post Graduates: Rs. 35000/- p.m.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC ACTREC Counselor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Counselor posts at TMC ACTREC is scheduled for 13 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: A Graduate degree in Psychology/Social Work or an equivalent discipline is the minimum qualification. A Postgraduate degree in Psychology or Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Counselor position at TMC ACTREC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The salary for Graduates is Rs. 30000/- per month, and for Post Graduates, it is Rs. 35000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Counselor role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any), and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate degree in Psychology or a Master's in Social Work with specialization in medical & psychiatric Social Work is considered desirable. Prior experience in Tobacco Control is also preferred.

faq.question: Q9. What languages should a candidate be fluent in?
faq.answer: Candidates must be fluent in Hindi, English, and at least one local regional language (Marathi, Konkani, or Gujarati).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC), Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, 410210.
